data.title: dso:red-test-writer agent omits .test-index update when creating RED test files
data.description: During sprint batch execution for epic 4ba1-759f, the dso:red-test-writer agent dispatched for task 8307-3cd0 created tests/skills/test-complexity-gate-shared-prompt.sh correctly but did not append any RED marker entries to .test-index. The task description and AC explicitly required 4 .test-index entries. Required manual orchestrator intervention to add the missing entries. The agent for task 651c-652f (same agent type, same session) did update .test-index correctly. Root cause: LLM-behavioral — agent may have read .test-index format but silently failed to append. Similar omission pattern to other known agent-skips-file-update bugs.
